chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 6133 of 2024 C.P No. D- 6160 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 27186/24. 3. For hearing of main case. 19.02.2026 Mr. Arbaz Wasif, Advocate for Petitioners in both Petitions. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajper, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, Advocate for Respondents. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- Learned counsel for the Petitioners files a Statement enclosing certain documents reflecting that the proceedings have been terminated in view of the orders made by the Islamabad High Court. The Petitions stand disposed of accordingly. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petition listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
